name: Chili of Penultimate Grooviness
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight or bring them to a boil, then turn off heat and soak for one hour.
2. Sauté the vegetables until soft and add to the beans along with the rest of the ingredients except TVP®.
3. Cook for one and a half hours, adding TVP® during the last 20 minutes of cooking.
